cards.back: Operations that take one relation as input, such as selection, projection, and renaming.
Operations that take two relations as input, such as join, union, and difference.
A unary relational operation that returns a relation containing only the columns specified in the select list.
A unary relational operation that returns a relation containing only the columns specified in the project list.
A function that performs aggregate operations such as sum, average, and count on a relation.
